title: Get started with AI-assisted development
summary: Learn how to use GitHub Copilot in a Visual Studio Code environment. This training covers code analysis, inline and project documentation, app development, unit testing, code refactoring, and provides an introduction to vibe coding. AZ-2007

sections.title: Get started with AI-assisted development
sections.summary: Learn how to use GitHub Copilot in a Visual Studio Code environment. This training covers code analysis, inline and project documentation, app development, unit testing, code refactoring, and provides an introduction to vibe coding. AZ-2007

lessons.title: Get started with GitHub Copilot
lessons.content_md:
This module introduces developers to the GitHub Copilot products, the benefits that GitHub Copilot provides to developers, the GitHub Copilot and GitHub Copilot Chat product features, and the GitHub Copilot extensions for Visual Studio Code.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/get-started-github-copilot/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Generate documentation using GitHub Copilot tools
lessons.content_md:
This module explores the generation of code explanations, project documentation, and inline code comment documentation using the GitHub Copilot Chat extension for Visual Studio Code.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/generate-documentation-using-github-copilot-tools/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Generate documentation using GitHub Copilot tools

lessons.title: Develop code features using GitHub Copilot tools
lessons.content_md:
This module explores using GitHub Copilot autocompletion suggestions to create new code. Autocompletion suggestions are generated, managed, and implemented using the GitHub Copilot extension for Visual Studio Code.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/develop-code-features-using-github-copilot-tools/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Develop code features using GitHub Copilot tools

lessons.title: Develop unit tests using GitHub Copilot tools
lessons.content_md:
This module explores using GitHub Copilot and GitHub Copilot Chat to create unit tests. Exercises provide practical experience creating unit test projects and running unit tests in Visual Studio Code.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/develop-unit-tests-using-github-copilot-tools/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Develop unit tests using GitHub Copilot tools

lessons.title: Implement code improvements using GitHub Copilot tools
lessons.content_md:
This module explores using GitHub Copilot Chat to develop improvements for an existing codebase. Exercises provide practical experience implementing GitHub Copilot suggestions that improve code quality, reliability, performance, and security.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-code-improvements-using-github-copilot-tools/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement code improvements using GitHub Copilot tools

lessons.title: Introduction to vibe coding
lessons.content_md:
This module examines the vibe coding approach to app development and how to implement a vibe coding process to create and refine an app using GitHub Copilot Agent.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduction-vibe-coding/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Get started with AI-assisted development
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Get started with AI-assisted development**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
